title.en: FIRE-FIGHTING (fire-extinguishing compositions, use of chemical substances in extinguishing fires A62D1/00; spraying, applying liquids or other fluent materials to surfaces in general B05; alarm arrangements G08B, e.g. fire alarms actuated by smoke or gases G08B17/10)
Fire prevention or containment (A62C3/00 takes precedence; flame traps A62C4/00)
Removing or cutting-off the supply of inflammable material
Physical fire-barriers
Fire prevention, containment or extinguishing specially adapted for particular objects or places ({in oil wells E21B29/08, A62C35/00; in mines or tunnels E21F5/00} ; for nuclear reactors G21C9/04)
{for warehouses, storage areas or other installations for storing goods}
{for kitchens or stoves}
{for decorations, e.g. Christmas trees (Christmas tree decorations incorporating fire extinguishing or fire prevention means A47G33/0872; blowing or snuffing out candle-flames F23Q25/00)}
for area conflagrations, e.g. forest fires, subterranean fires

of highly inflammable material, e.g. light metals, petroleum products
in vehicles, e.g. in road vehicles
{in connection with doors, windows, ventilators, partitions, or shutters, e.g. automatic closing}
in electrical installations, e.g. cableways

in gas-pipes (safety valves F16K17/00)
in flues or chimneys

{Apparatus for mixing extinguishants with water}

with pressure gas produced by chemicals
